passiveAbilities.name: Plate Armour
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all non-Magical Dmg suffered by -2.

passiveAbilities.name: Vicious
passiveAbilities.description: Each time this model causes one or more Wds to an enemy, it gains 1 energy. Max. 3 times per turn.

passiveAbilities.name: Short 'n Stabby
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

passiveAbilities.name: Lard Lover
passiveAbilities.description: This character gains +2 Melee stat if there is a Giant within 4”.

arcaneAbilities.name: Where’d You Come From!?
arcaneAbilities.description:
Place this model anywhere in base contact with target enemy
Catastrophe: The resisting player places this model anywhere within 6”.

signatureMove.name: Groin Tickler
signatureMove.passiveEffect: Damage from this attack cannot be reduced by passive abilities.
signatureMove.endStepEffect: You may place this model anywhere in base contact with the enemy model.
